subcodes.title: Words to Florence Khan, spoken on 1906-06-13
subcodes.first_line: Whatever good deeds man performs in this world have been originally inculcated by the Prophets and Manifestations of God. Were it not for the Prophets' teachings
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @station of the Manifestation of God, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
